response.justification: While Bogdan is an exceptional software engineer with 15+ years of full-stack experience, this role requires embedded firmware security expertise with a critical hard requirement of native Japanese proficiency. His background is entirely in web, mobile, and backend systems with no embedded systems, kernel-level work, or security domain knowledge (encryption protocols, authentication systems, tamper detection). The language requirement alone is disqualifying, and the technical domain gap is too substantial to bridge without extensive retraining.
strengths: Proven mastery of software craftsmanship including TDD, CI/CD, and clean architecture across 15+ years
Demonstrates ability to learn new domains and technologies (DLang, web-to-mobile-to-backend transitions)
Strong communication and teaching skills with mentorship experience
concerns: Zero embedded systems, firmware, or kernel-level development experience; career entirely in web/mobile/backend
Native Japanese language proficiency explicitly required but not present; resume shows only English (fluent), Romanian, and German (basic)
Lacks security domain expertise: no encryption protocols, authentication systems (802.1X, Captive Portal), MACsec, tamper detection, or networking fundamentals

key_factors.factor: No embedded systems or firmware experience
Strong general software engineering and learning ability
